findings.description: Command-type Stop hooks with exit code 2 are buggy in Claude Code. Prompt/agent types avoid the issue.
findings.proposedRule: P9: Prefer prompt/agent hook types over command hooks in plugins.

findings.description: Adding Lite intensity path created a dead path because sw-plan required design.md which Lite doesn't produce. Wiring gate end-to-end trace caught it.
findings.proposedRule: P10: Trace new execution paths end-to-end through the skill chain.

findings.description: 3 of 4 original verify warnings were pre-existing token budget overages. Small fixes resolved them in the same work unit.
findings.proposedRule: P11: Fix pre-existing debt surfaced by verify in the same work unit.

findings.description: Constraint compression (combining bullets, removing verbose phrases) cut SKILL.md files by 20-30% without losing semantics.
Reviewing Claude Pilot yielded 4 implementable improvements filtered through charter invariants.
findings.proposedRule: P12: Periodic competitive analysis filtered through charter invariants.
